name: sync registries: /standards-add scaffold completes within 60 seconds for a new entry (per §21 DoD criterion)
command: start=$(date +%s) && mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" --url https://my.com/x --id my-x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --tree "$PWD/tree" && end=$(date +%s) && elapsed=$((end-start)) && [ "$elapsed" -le 60 ] && echo "ok elapsed=${elapsed}s" 1>&2
